MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Leticia Perez, Bailiff: Louis Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo .
Appearances:
Annie Horton, Esq. for Plaintiff, Greg Markoulis Property Manager present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Angelo Markoulis and against the defendant Get Real Girl, Inc.
Damages of $75,220.72
Each party pays their own attorney fees
Total Judgment of $75,220.72
Judgment signed in open court.
